assertions.assertion: The kiosk.app client AllowedGrantTypes includes Ciba or 'urn:openid:params:grant-type:ciba'
assertions.rationale: CIBA grant type URI is a well-known OIDC standard that an LLM would likely know.

assertions.assertion: Code includes an implementation of IBackchannelAuthenticationUserValidator that processes login_hint
assertions.rationale: An LLM familiar with CIBA may know user validation is required, though the exact interface name is Duende-specific.
The exact notification service interface name is Duende-specific.

assertions.assertion: Both CIBA interfaces are registered in the DI container
assertions.rationale: Without knowledge of exact interface names, proper DI registration cannot be shown.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that CIBA requires the Enterprise Edition
assertions.rationale: Edition requirements are Duende licensing details unlikely to be known without documentation.
